# sailpoint_access_profile (Resource)

Resource for SailPoint Access Profile. Access profiles bundle entitlements from a single source into a reusable unit that can be assigned to roles or requested directly.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Minimal access profile
resource "sailpoint_access_profile" "basic" {
  name = "DB Read Access"

  owner = {
    type = "IDENTITY"
    id   = "REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_IDENTITY_ID"
  }

  source = {
    type = "SOURCE"
    id   = "REPLACE_WITH_SOURCE_ID"
  }
}

# Full configuration
resource "sailpoint_access_profile" "full" {
  name        = "Payroll Admin Access"
  description = "Full access to payroll system administration"
  enabled     = true
  requestable = true

  owner = {
    type = "IDENTITY"
    id   = "REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_IDENTITY_ID"
  }

  source = {
    type = "SOURCE"
    id   = "REPLACE_WITH_SOURCE_ID"
  }

  entitlements = [
    { type = "ENTITLEMENT", id = "REPLACE_WITH_ENTITLEMENT_ID_1" },
    { type = "ENTITLEMENT", id = "REPLACE_WITH_ENTITLEMENT_ID_2" },
  ]

  access_request_config = {
    comments_required        = true
    denial_comments_required = true
    approval_schemes = [
      { approver_type = "MANAGER" },
      { approver_type = "GOVERNANCE_GROUP", approver_id = "REPLACE_WITH_GOVERNANCE_GROUP_ID" },
    ]
  }

  segments = ["REPLACE_WITH_SEGMENT_ID"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the access profile.
- `owner` (Attributes) The owner of the access profile. Typically `type = IDENTITY`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--owner))
- `source` (Attributes) The source the access profile draws entitlements from. `type = SOURCE`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source))

### Optional

- `access_request_config` (Attributes) Access request configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_request_config))
- `additional_owners` (Attributes Set) Additional owners. Each may be `IDENTITY` or `GOVERNANCE_GROUP`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--additional_owners))
- `description` (String) Description (max 2000 characters).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the access profile is enabled. When `true`, at least one entitlement must be provided.
- `entitlements` (Attributes Set) Entitlements bundled into this access profile. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entitlements))
- `provisioning_criteria` (Attributes) Provisioning criteria tree. Max 3 levels deep. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provisioning_criteria))
- `requestable` (Boolean) Whether the access profile can be requested. Defaults to `true`.
- `revoke_request_config` (Attributes) Revoke request configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--revoke_request_config))
- `segments` (Set of String) Segment UUIDs this access profile is visible in.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String)
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the access profile.
- `modified` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--owner"></a>
### Nested Schema for `owner`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--source"></a>
### Nested Schema for `source`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--access_request_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_request_config`

Optional:

- `approval_schemes` (Attributes List) Ordered approval chain for access requests. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_request_config--approval_schemes))
- `comments_required` (Boolean)
- `denial_comments_required` (Boolean)
- `max_permitted_access_duration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_request_config--max_permitted_access_duration))
- `reauthorization_required` (Boolean)
- `require_end_date` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--access_request_config--approval_schemes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_request_config.approval_schemes`

Required:

- `approver_type` (String) One of `APP_OWNER`, `OWNER`, `SOURCE_OWNER`, `MANAGER`, `GOVERNANCE_GROUP`, `WORKFLOW`.

Optional:

- `approver_id` (String) ID of the approver. Required when `approver_type` is `GOVERNANCE_GROUP` or `WORKFLOW`.


<a id="nestedatt--access_request_config--max_permitted_access_duration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_request_config.max_permitted_access_duration`

Optional:

- `time_unit` (String) One of `HOURS`, `DAYS`, `WEEKS`, `MONTHS`.
- `value` (Number)



<a id="nestedatt--additional_owners"></a>
### Nested Schema for `additional_owners`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)

### Nested Schema for `entitlements`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)

Required:

Optional:

- `attribute` (String)
- `children` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provisioning_criteria--children))
- `value` (String)

### Nested Schema for `provisioning_criteria.children`

Required:

Optional:

- `attribute` (String)
- `children` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provisioning_criteria--children--children))
- `value` (String)

### Nested Schema for `provisioning_criteria.children.children`

Optional:

- `value` (String)




<a id="nestedatt--revoke_request_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `revoke_request_config`

Optional:

- `approval_schemes` (Attributes List) Ordered approval chain for revoke requests. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--revoke_request_config--approval_schemes))

<a id="nestedatt--revoke_request_config--approval_schemes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `revoke_request_config.approval_schemes`

Required:

- `approver_type` (String) One of `APP_OWNER`, `OWNER`, `SOURCE_OWNER`, `MANAGER`, `GOVERNANCE_GROUP`, `WORKFLOW`.

Optional:

- `approver_id` (String) ID of the approver. Required when `approver_type` is `GOVERNANCE_GROUP` or `WORKFLOW`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
#!/bin/bash
# Import an existing access profile by its ID
terraform import sailpoint_access_profile.full "REPLACE_WITH_ACCESS_PROFILE_ID"
```
